title: Clear Explosions
description: A lightweight Minecraft texture pack that completely removes explosion particles, giving you smoother gameplay and higher FPS during intense fights or TNT cannons.
body:
Tired of huge explosion particles blocking your vision during PvP or survival gameplay?
**Clear Explosions** is designed to give you a competitive edge by **removing all explosion particles** while keeping the rest of Minecraft’s visuals untouched.

✨ **Why use this pack?**

* 🚀 **FPS Boost** – Less particle rendering = smoother gameplay.
* ⚔️ **PvP Friendly** – Stay focused in battles without big explosion effects blocking your view.
* 🔧 **Compatible with all versions** – Works across **Minecraft 1.8 – 1.21**.
* 🎮 **Lightweight & Simple** – Just plug and play, no performance mods required.

This pack is perfect for **competitive PvP, bedwars, skywars, UHC, TNT cannons, and SMP players** who want **clear vision + higher performance**.
